name: open-paw
description: Local-first AI coding & cowork desktop app with first-class local model support.
author: ermish

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @open-paw/host && npm run build -w @open-paw/desktop
scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @open-paw/shared && npm run build -w @open-paw/core
scripts.build:web: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @open-paw/host && npm run build -w @open-paw/desktop && npm run build -w @open-paw/server
scripts.web: npm run build:web && npm run start -w @open-paw/server
scripts.bundle:web: npm run build:web && npm run bundle -w @open-paw/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/shared && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/core && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/host && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/server && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/relay && npm run typecheck -w @open-paw/cli
scripts.relay: npm run build -w @open-paw/relay && npm run start -w @open-paw/relay
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @open-paw/desktop
